name: desktop-taste
description: Desktop UI/UX taste skills for coding Agents building macOS and Windows applications.

interface.shortDescription: Improve macOS and Windows app UI
interface.longDescription: Desktop Taste helps coding Agents recognize macOS and Windows desktop UI/UX tasks, run a design read before implementation, and route work toward better layout, typography, spacing, density, motion, native feel, and product-specific expression.
defaultPrompt: Decide whether this UI task belongs to Desktop Taste
Run a Desktop Read before editing this desktop app UI
Route this desktop UI task to audit, redesign, native feel, layout, typography, motion, brand, or DESIGN.md
